title: Untargeted Metabolomics To Ascertain Antibiotic Modes of Action.
author: Vincent IM Ehmann DE Mills SD Perros M Barrett MP
content: S-EPMC4808186 PMC4808186 Untargeted Metabolomics To Ascertain Antibiotic Modes of Action. Deciphering the mode of action (MOA) of new antibiotics discovered through phenotypic screening is of increasing importance. Metabolomics offers a potentially rapid and cost-effective means of identifying
